info.title: Lever API
info.description: Lever recruitment platform REST API providing access to opportunities, candidates, applications, postings, interviews, feedback, files, notes, offers, stages, users, referrals, requisitions, and webhooks.

get.description: Returns a list of all opportunities with pagination
Returns a single opportunity by ID

put.description: Updates the stage of an opportunity
Updates contact links for an opportunity

post.description: Submits an application to a posting

get.summary: List users with access to posting

get.description: Returns feedback forms for an opportunity
Returns EEO responses with personally identifiable information

basicAuth.description: Lever API key as username, password left blank
